concept: Please design an adventure where you navigate as a quantum ghost existing in multiple probability states simultaneously, needing to align your various versions to solve complex puzzles. Moving through the world splits your existence across divergent timelines, with actions in one reality having unpredictable effects on your alternate selves. Special focus points allow briefly merging your quantum states to overcome obstacles requiring concentrated energy or presence. Certain enemies can collapse your quantum superposition, forcing a restart from the nearest probability anchor. The final revelation shows you're actually collecting fragments of yourself scattered across realities after a catastrophic experiment went wrong.
